caption: A man with a grey, spiky wig and glasses is seated in a recording studio, wearing a white collared shirt and a red bow tie. He wears black over-ear headphones and speaks into a black microphone positioned in front of him. The background is a wall covered in numerous framed photographs and a yellow "LEE" sign. On the left side of the frame, a logo reads "TALK RADIO" above the word "PODCAST". On the right side, red text reads "SS TALK JOY" with "PODCAST" written underneath in smaller white letters. As the scene progresses, the man's mouth moves as he speaks, and he slightly adjusts his head position, while the background and equipment remain static.
